title: Dapsilanthus spathaceus
taxonomy: Dapsilanthus spathaceus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It belongs to the genus Dapsilanthus and is native to Australia. The family Asphodelaceae is a group of monocot flowering plants that also includes the aloe and asphodel. This classification places Dapsilanthus spathaceus within the larger monocot clade and highlights its relationships to other plants in the same family. The classification of Dapsilanthus spathaceus reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
